description_long: This is a rectangular wooden cabinet with a dark, stone-like countertop surface. The front side features three vertical panels, each with a subtle horizontal groove near the top, suggesting the presence of doors. The back side reveals two open shelving units with two shelves each, separated by a central open compartment, providing ample storage space. The sides are plain, showing the wood grain pattern without any additional features. The cabinet sits directly on the ground with no visible legs or base, giving it a sturdy and grounded appearance. Its design is modern and functional, suitable for use in urban environments such as offices, lobbies, or communal spaces.
description: A modern wooden cabinet with a dark countertop, featuring three front doors and open shelving at the back. It has a sturdy, rectangular build and a clean, functional design.
description_view_0: The front view shows three vertical wooden panels with subtle grooves, indicating doors.
description_view_1: The left side view displays a plain wooden surface with visible wood grain and no additional features.
description_view_2: The back view reveals two open shelving units with two shelves each and a central open compartment.
description_view_3: The right side view mirrors the left, showing a plain wooden surface with no distinguishing features.
